name: Creamy Scallops and Pasta
recipeIngredient: 6 cups hot cooked medium pasta shells
recipeInstructions:
1. Set oven to broil.
2. Spray a 2-quart casserole with nonstick cooking spray.
3. Cook shallots, broth and thyme in a 12-inch nonstick skillet over medium heat until shallots are tender. Stir in flour. Cook 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
4. Stir in milk, sour cream, salt, pepper and nutmeg. Simmer 3 minutes, stirring frequently, until slightly thickened.
5. Stir in scallops and pasta. Cook 2 minutes longer.
6. Mix parsley and lemon peel; sprinkle over scallop mixture.
7. Serve 6 servings.
